2606.04388.title: TITAN-FedAnil+: Trust-Based Adaptive Blockchain Federated Learning for Resource-Constrained Intelligent Enterprises
2606.04388.paper_summary: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as an effective paradigm for collaborative intelligence while preserving data privacy. However, data heterogeneity arising from non-IID distributions and decentralized security threats remain significant challenges, particularly in resource-constrained enterprise environments. This paper presents TITAN-FedAnil+, a Trust-Based Adaptive Network for blockchain-enabled federated learning in intelligent enterprises. The proposed framework introduces affinity propagation-based adaptive clustered aggregation to identify and filter malicious updates without requiring prior knowledge of the number of attackers. In addition, GPU-accelerated vectorization is employed to improve computational efficiency, while a signed state jump mechanism enables lightweight blockchain resynchronization. Experimental results demonstrate substantial reductions in memory overhead, achieving up to 81% savings across 50 communication rounds on constrained 8 GB edge devices compared with the baseline framework. The results indicate that TITAN-FedAnil+ effectively improves robustness, scalability, and resource efficiency for secure federated learning deployments in intelligent enterprise environments.
2606.04388.paper_summary_zh: 聯邦學習（FL）已成為在保護數據隱私的同時實現協作智能的有效範式。<lb/>然而，來自非獨立同分佈的數據異質性和去中心化的安全威脅仍然是重大挑戰，特別是在資源受限的企業環境中。<lb/>本文提出了TITAN-FedAnil+，這是一個基於信任的自適應網絡，旨在為智能企業中的區塊鏈支持的聯邦學習提供解決方案。<lb/>所提出的框架引入了基於親和力傳播的自適應聚類聚合，以識別和過濾惡意更新，而無需事先了解攻擊者的數量。<lb/>此外，採用GPU加速向量化來提高計算效率，同時簽名狀態跳躍機制實現輕量級區塊鏈重新同步。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，在與基線框架相比的資源受限的8 GB邊緣設備上，內存開銷大幅減少，在50次通信回合中實現了高達81%的節省。<lb/>結果表明，TITAN-FedAnil+有效提高了在智能企業環境中安全聯邦學習部署的穩健性、可擴展性和資源效率。
2606.04388.author: Muhammad Hadi et.al.
2606.04388.authors: Muhammad Hadi, Muhammad Jahangir, Talha Shafique, Muhammad Khuram Shahzad
